spec.expr:
(max(github_ci_job_status{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"failure|timed_out" }) by ( ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 1) > 0 or
(max(github_ci_job_status{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"success|completed"}) by ( ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 2) > 0 
or
(max(github_ci_job_status{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"cancelled|action_required" }) by ( ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 3) > 0 or 
(max(github_ci_job_status{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"queued|requested|waiting|pending|stale|neutral" }) by (  ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 4) > 0 or
(max(github_ci_job_status{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"in_progress" }) by ( ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 5) > 0 or
(max(github_ci_job_status{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"skipped" }) by ( ref,name,pipeline_id,duration) * 6) > 0

max by (service, path) (
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"in_progress"}) by (service, path) + 5000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"queued|requested|waiting|pending|stale|neutral"}) by (service, path) + 4000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"cancelled|action_required"}) by (service, path) + 3000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"failure|timed_out"}) by (service, path) + 2000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"success|completed"}) by (service, path) + 1000)
)

(max(github_ci_step{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"failure|timed_out",job_id=~"$JOB_ID" }) by ( ref,name,number,path,pipeline_id,job_id,duration) * 1) > 0 or
(max(github_ci_step{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"success|completed",job_id=~"$JOB_ID"}) by ( ref,name,number,path,pipeline_id,job_id,duration) * 2) > 0 
or
(max(github_ci_step{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"cancelled|action_required",job_id=~"$JOB_ID" }) by ( ref,name,number,path,pipeline_id,job_id,duration) * 3) > 0 or 
(max(github_ci_step{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"queued|requested|waiting|pending|stale|neutral",job_id=~"$JOB_ID" }) by (  ref,name,number,path,pipeline_id,job_id,duration) * 4) > 0 or
(max(github_ci_step{ path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"in_progress",job_id=~"$JOB_ID" }) by ( ref,name,number,path,pipeline_id,job_id,duration) * 5) > 0

max by (service, path) (
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH", status=~"in_progress"}) by (service, path) + 5000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"queued|requested|waiting|pending|stale|neutral"}) by (service, path) + 4000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"cancelled|action_required"}) by (service, path) + 3000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"failure|timed_out"}) by (service, path) + 2000)
  or
  (count(github_ci_pipeline{path=~"$PATH", ref=~"$BRANCH",status=~"success|completed"}) by (service, path) + 1000)
)
